_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: both 26T and S462 cells were relatively resistant to MEK inhibition with high IC50s and treatment failing to achieve maximal efficacy
details: Relatively resistant to MEK inhibition with mirdametinib, showing high IC50s and treatment failing to achieve maximal efficacy
